description: Canonical business invariants for TGroup. Each rule describes what MUST hold. Enforcement is tracked separately.

invariants.rule: customer.name must be non-empty after trimming whitespace
invariants.rationale: Name is the primary human identifier; blank names break all list/search displays and appointment records
invariants.source: validateCustomerForm() in website/src/data/mockCustomerForm.ts:133 — explicit name.trim() check

invariants.rule: customer.phone must be non-empty after trimming whitespace
invariants.rationale: Phone is the primary contact channel for appointment reminders and the de-facto uniqueness check before creating a new record
invariants.source: validateCustomerForm() in website/src/data/mockCustomerForm.ts:134 — explicit phone.trim() check

invariants.rule: customer.phone must be unique across all non-deleted partner records
invariants.rationale: Duplicate phones cause misidentification of patients in appointment and payment workflows
invariants.source: checkPartnerExists(phone, email, excludeId) in website/src/lib/api.ts:165 — called from AddCustomerForm before submit

invariants.rule: customer.status must be one of: 'active' | 'inactive' | 'pending'
invariants.rationale: UI badges and filter logic depend on this fixed vocabulary; unknown values break rendering
invariants.source: CustomerStatus type in website/src/types/customer.ts:6

invariants.rule: customer.companyid must reference an existing dbo.companies record
invariants.rationale: Customers without a valid branch are invisible to location-scoped queries and never appear in any dashboard
invariants.source: CustomerFormData.companyid field in website/src/types/customer.ts:29; location filter in taxonomy.json journey location-filter

invariants.rule: customers referenced by appointments or payments must never be hard-deleted; only soft-deleted via isdeleted flag
invariants.rationale: Hard deleting a customer with linked appointments or payments orphans those records and corrupts historical reporting
invariants.source: AUDIT_REPORT.md CRIT-2: hard-delete endpoint exists with no auth guard; dbo.partners is sourceOfTruth for both customers and employees (taxonomy.json)

invariants.rule: customer.gender must be one of: 'male' | 'female' | 'other' | '' (empty = not specified)
invariants.rationale: Gender is used for salutation display and analytics segmentation; unexpected values break rendering
invariants.source: CustomerFormData.gender type in website/src/types/customer.ts:25

invariants.rule: appointment.status must be one of: 'scheduled' | 'arrived' | 'cancelled' (UI-selectable) or 'confirmed' | 'in-progress' | 'completed' (extended display states)
invariants.rationale: All calendar rendering, filter, and reporting logic branches on this value; an unknown status causes silent display failures
invariants.source: APPOINTMENT_STATUS_OPTIONS in website/src/constants/index.ts:329-333; APPOINTMENT_STATUS_COLORS keys; AppointmentStatus type in appointment.ts:8

invariants.rule: appointment.checkInStatus must be one of: 'not-arrived' | 'arrived' | 'waiting' | 'in-treatment' | 'done'
invariants.rationale: Reception flow and WaitTimer depend on this enum for transitions; undefined values break check-in UI state machine
invariants.source: CheckInStatus type in website/src/types/appointment.ts:9; CHECK_IN_FLOW_ORDER constant

invariants.rule: checkInStatus transitions must follow the order: not-arrived -> arrived -> waiting -> in-treatment -> done; reversal is not allowed
invariants.rationale: WaitTimer calculates elapsed time from arrivalTime; out-of-order transitions produce negative durations and corrupt wait statistics
invariants.source: CHECK_IN_FLOW_ORDER readonly array in website/src/types/appointment.ts:55-61; customer-checkin journey in taxonomy.json

invariants.rule: appointment.date combined with startTime must form a valid ISO datetime; endTime must be strictly after startTime
invariants.rationale: Calendar grid layout and drag-reschedule both compute pixel positions from time deltas; invalid or inverted times produce invisible or overlapping cards
invariants.source: CalendarAppointment.date/startTime/endTime fields in appointment.ts:22-24; useDragReschedule.handleDrop in taxonomy.json journey appointment-reschedule

invariants.rule: appointment.customerId must reference an existing dbo.partners record with customer=true
invariants.rationale: Orphaned appointments cannot display patient info and break profile history views
invariants.source: CalendarAppointment.customerId in appointment.ts:13; appointment-create journey step 3 (CustomerSelector)

invariants.rule: appointment.dentistId (doctorId) must reference a dbo.partners record with employee=true and isdoctor=true
invariants.rationale: Doctor filter and schedule views only show doctors; assigning a non-doctor breaks those displays
invariants.source: CalendarAppointment.dentistId in appointment.ts:19; ROLE_TO_DB_FLAGS['doctor'] in employee.ts:80

invariants.rule: appointment.locationId must reference an existing dbo.companies record
invariants.rationale: Global location filter queries appointments by companyId; unmatched locationId hides the appointment from all scoped views
invariants.source: CalendarAppointment.locationId in appointment.ts:26; location-filter journey in taxonomy.json

invariants.rule: appointment.arrivalTime must be non-null when checkInStatus is 'arrived', 'waiting', 'in-treatment', or 'done'
invariants.rationale: WaitTimer computes elapsed time from arrivalTime; null arrival time while in a post-arrival state causes NaN display
invariants.source: ManagedAppointment.arrivalTime: string | null in appointment.ts:48; customer-checkin journey step 5

invariants.rule: payment.amount must be > 0
invariants.rationale: Zero or negative payments corrupt outstanding balance totals and allow fraudulent reversals disguised as charges
invariants.source: PaymentFormData.amount: number in website/src/components/payment/PaymentForm.tsx:36; financial domain norm; useDeposits.ts:67 checks amount > 0

invariants.rule: payment.amount must not exceed selectedRecord.residual (outstanding balance) by more than 1%
invariants.rationale: Overpayment would make remainingBalance negative, corrupting the debt ledger
invariants.source: PaymentForm.tsx:220 — explicit guard: totalPayment > selectedRecord.residual * 1.01 triggers validation error

invariants.rule: payment.method must be one of: 'cash' | 'bank_transfer' | 'deposit' | 'mixed'
invariants.rationale: Reporting and QR-code display branch on method; unknown values crash VietQrModal and payment summaries
invariants.source: PaymentMethod type in website/src/types/payment.ts:7; PaymentFormData.method in PaymentForm.tsx:37

invariants.rule: payment.status must be one of: 'completed' | 'pending' | 'partial' | 'refunded'
invariants.rationale: PaymentHistory table and status badges depend on this fixed set
invariants.source: PaymentStatus type in website/src/types/payment.ts:10; PAYMENT_STATUS_COLORS keys in constants/index.ts:41

invariants.rule: void operation is allowed only when payment.status == 'completed' (posted); voiding an already-voided or pending payment is forbidden
invariants.rationale: Double-voiding restores a balance twice, inflating outstanding debt; voiding pending payments that were never posted makes no sense
invariants.source: AUDIT_REPORT.md CRIT-4/CRIT-5: void endpoint uses SET status='voided'; payment-void journey in taxonomy.json step 4

invariants.rule: when method == 'mixed', sum(sources.depositAmount + sources.cashAmount + sources.bankAmount) must equal payment.amount
invariants.rationale: Mismatched breakdown causes unreconciled ledger entries where total paid differs from component breakdown
invariants.source: PaymentRecord.sources breakdown in payment.ts:49-53; PaymentSourceBreakdown interface in PaymentForm.tsx:23-27

invariants.rule: payment.customerId must reference an existing dbo.partners record with customer=true
invariants.rationale: Payment history and outstanding balance views are scoped by customerId; orphaned payments are invisible to staff
invariants.source: PaymentRecord.customerId in payment.ts:35; payment-create journey step 2 (CustomerSelector)

invariants.rule: payment.recordId must reference an existing dbo.saleorders or dbo.dotkhams record (per recordType)
invariants.rationale: Payment must be applied to a real service record; unmatched recordId leaves the service balance unreduced
invariants.source: PaymentRecord.recordId + recordType in payment.ts:38-39; PaymentForm only shows records with residual > 0 (PaymentForm.tsx:141,151)

invariants.rule: employee.status must be one of: 'active' | 'on-leave' | 'inactive'
invariants.rationale: Doctor selectors and schedule views filter by status; unknown values cause employees to appear where they should not
invariants.source: EmployeeStatus type in website/src/types/employee.ts:19

invariants.rule: employee.tier must be one of: 'junior' | 'mid' | 'senior' | 'lead' | 'director'
invariants.rationale: Tier drives commission calculations and TierSelector rendering; out-of-range values break display
invariants.source: EmployeeTier type + ALL_TIERS constant in website/src/types/employee.ts:6,89

invariants.rule: each value in employee.roles[] must be one of the 9 defined EmployeeRole values
invariants.rationale: ROLE_TO_DB_FLAGS maps roles to boolean DB columns; an unknown role silently maps to all-false flags, mis-classifying the employee
invariants.source: EmployeeRole type + ALL_ROLES constant + ROLE_TO_DB_FLAGS in employee.ts:8-100

invariants.rule: employee.email must be unique within the same companyId (locationId)
invariants.rationale: Email is the login credential; duplicate emails in the same branch create ambiguous authentication
invariants.source: employee-create journey step 6 (inserts into dbo.partners with employee=true); auth login flow uses email as identifier (taxonomy.json login journey)

invariants.rule: employee.locationId must reference an existing dbo.companies record; locationScopeIds (if set) must all reference existing dbo.companies records
invariants.rationale: Location-scoped permission checks use locationScopeIds; dangling references silently grant or deny access incorrectly
invariants.source: Employee.locationId + locationScopeIds in employee.ts:34-36; location-filter journey in taxonomy.json

invariants.rule: when employee.roles includes 'doctor', the DB flags isdoctor=true, isassistant=false, isreceptionist=false must be set (exactly one primary role flag active at a time)
invariants.rationale: inferRoleFromFlags() reads these mutually exclusive flags to reconstruct role; conflicting flags yield wrong role inference
invariants.source: ROLE_TO_DB_FLAGS in employee.ts:68-87; inferRoleFromFlags() function in employee.ts:45-66

invariants.rule: monthlyPlan.downPayment must be >= 0 and < monthlyPlan.totalAmount
invariants.rationale: A down payment >= totalAmount means nothing is owed in installments; plan creation would generate zero or negative installment amounts
invariants.source: MonthlyPlan.totalAmount + downPayment in monthlyPlans.ts:38-39; monthly-plan-create journey step 3

invariants.rule: monthlyPlan.numberOfInstallments must be >= 1
invariants.rationale: Zero installments means no repayment schedule is generated; the plan would have a balance with no mechanism to clear it
invariants.source: MonthlyPlan.numberOfInstallments: number in monthlyPlans.ts:40; PlanCreationInput.numberOfInstallments in monthlyPlans.ts:57

invariants.rule: sum of all Installment.amount values must equal (monthlyPlan.totalAmount - monthlyPlan.downPayment)
invariants.rationale: A mismatch leaves an unaccounted gap or surplus in the repayment schedule, creating a permanently unclearable balance
invariants.source: MonthlyPlan.installmentAmount * numberOfInstallments pattern in useMonthlyPlans.ts:28-31; monthly-plan-create journey step 4

invariants.rule: monthlyPlan.status must be one of: 'active' | 'completed' | 'defaulted' | 'draft'
invariants.rationale: InstallmentTracker and plan list filters branch on this status; unknown values cause rendering gaps
invariants.source: PlanStatus type in website/src/types/monthlyPlans.ts:7

invariants.rule: plan status transitions: draft -> active -> completed; active -> defaulted; completed and defaulted are terminal states
invariants.rationale: Reactivating a completed plan would re-open a settled debt; transitioning from defaulted to completed without actual payment corrupts the ledger
invariants.source: PlanStatus values in monthlyPlans.ts:7; monthly-plan-create journey; financial domain norms

invariants.rule: a monthlyPlan must not be deleted if any of its Installment records have status == 'paid'
invariants.rationale: Deleting a plan with paid installments removes evidence of received payments, creating unreconcilable financial records
invariants.source: Installment.status: InstallmentStatus in monthlyPlans.ts:15; financial audit norms; monthly-plan-create journey step 6

invariants.rule: monthlyPlan.customerId must reference an existing dbo.partners record with customer=true
invariants.rationale: Plans without a valid customer cannot be displayed on the patient payment page
invariants.source: MonthlyPlan.customerId in monthlyPlans.ts:32; PlanCreationInput.customerId in monthlyPlans.ts:50

invariants.rule: Installment.status must be one of: 'paid' | 'upcoming' | 'overdue' | 'pending'
invariants.rationale: InstallmentTracker UI classifies installments by color and action buttons based on this value
invariants.source: InstallmentStatus type in website/src/types/monthlyPlans.ts:6

invariants.rule: service.totalCost must be >= 0
invariants.rationale: Negative service costs would create negative outstanding balances, allowing money to be fabricated through payment allocation
invariants.source: ServiceRecord.totalCost: number in service.ts:57; ServiceCatalogItem.defaultPrice: number in service.ts:16 — no negative price semantics defined

invariants.rule: service.paidAmount must be <= service.totalCost
invariants.rationale: Overpayment on a service record makes remainingBalance negative, showing credit that was never deposited
invariants.source: ServiceRecord.totalCost + paidAmount in service.ts:57-58; OutstandingBalance.tsx:77 computes paid = totalCost - remainingBalance

invariants.rule: service.status must be one of: 'active' | 'completed' | 'cancelled'
invariants.rationale: ServiceHistoryList and MultiVisitTracker filter and badge on this enum; unknown values cause rendering errors
invariants.source: ServiceStatus type in website/src/types/service.ts:8

invariants.rule: service.totalVisits must be >= 1
invariants.rationale: MultiVisitTracker computes progress as completedVisits / totalVisits; zero totalVisits causes division-by-zero
invariants.source: ServiceRecord.totalVisits: number in service.ts:53; ServiceCatalogItem.totalVisits: number in service.ts:19

invariants.rule: service.completedVisits must be >= 0 and <= service.totalVisits
invariants.rationale: completedVisits > totalVisits produces a progress bar > 100%, an impossible state that signals data corruption
invariants.source: ServiceRecord.totalVisits + completedVisits in service.ts:53-54; MultiVisitTracker progress computation

invariants.rule: service.customerId must reference an existing dbo.partners record with customer=true
invariants.rationale: Service records without a valid patient cannot be displayed in CustomerProfile or linked to payments
invariants.source: ServiceRecord.customerId in service.ts:38; service-record journey step 3 (fetches from POST /api/SaleOrders)
